Line1: Forget everything you've seen about Minecraft so far. Aetheria is a suspended oasis where
every challenge is a game created by a deity. In this world, every gamemode is not just
a pastime, but the expression of a God who has dictated his own rules, challenging the
Line2: Our mission is the revolution: we want to move away from the classic "copy-paste"
to give life to a real evolution of the modes you already know. We put everything on
the professionalism and technical quality, overturning the old schemes to offer you something
Line3: Aetheria is the first game server of the Neo Galaxy Community, born to bring the same
quality standard that distinguishes our entire ecosystem even to the blocks.

Community.Line1: Community is where it all begins—a place where, quite simply, people come together to have a good time. It doesn’t matter if you’re a gaming enthusiast or just looking for a chat after a long day: here, you’ll always find someone to share a moment with.
Community.Line2: We organize events, jump on calls to chat about the latest news, or hop into a quick tactical game to blow off some steam. It’s a living space, created to bridge the gap and turn a nickname into a friend. And this is exactly where our Minecraft server comes to life: not just a world of blocks, but a gathering point where we unleash our creativity and live out the adventures we dream of together.
Community.Line3: This is the place where our craziest stories come to life, and where every new idea immediately finds someone ready to support it.
Community.Line4:
The only one missing is you.
Come and be part of our story.

Home.Line1: Neo Galaxy was born from a simple idea: bringing people and their passions together under one digital roof.
Home.Line2: We aren't just a group of friends or a team of developers; we are a network where every piece fits together to give you exactly what you’re looking for. Whether you’re here to unwind after a long day of study or work, or you need a technical team to launch your next big idea, you’re in the right place.
Home.Line3: Our ecosystem thrives on the warmth of our Community, where we host events and gaming sessions, and the precision of our Software House, ready to turn your projects into real code.

Line1: NGSH is born as a true software workshop: our main goal is to conceive, develop,
and launch innovative digital solutions that we sign with our brand. We are constantly
working on new products to bring to market, designed to solve concrete problems or improve
the experience of those who live the web.
Line2: But we don’t stop there. We’ve decided to make all this experience which goes
beyond just code, but also strategy and design available to those with ambitious
projects. If you have an idea but don’t know how to bring it to life, our freelancing
team is ready to support you: we start with a free initial consultation to scope the work
and then move on to execution.
Line3: From the realization of websites and desktop applications to more extensive consultations
and specializations in the gaming world (such as plugins and solutions for Minecraft),
we transform your plans into reality. In short: we create software that we love to use ourselves,
and we help you do the same with yours.
